I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me analyze each fix:

### Fix 1 Analysis (Line 72 - Button.variant type change)
The type of `Button.variant` added `'stateful'` to the union. The current code uses `variant={ButtonVariant.primary}` which is `'primary'` — a value that exists in both old and new types. **No code change is needed** — `'primary'` is still valid in the new type.

### Fix 2 Analysis (Line 52 - EmptyState Family Migration)
The rule says `EmptyStateHeader` is deprecated in v6. In PF v6, the props that were on `EmptyStateHeader` (`headingLevel`, `icon`, `titleText`) should be moved directly onto `EmptyState`. `EmptyStateIcon` is also deprecated — the `icon` prop on `EmptyState` takes a `ReactNode` directly.

Looking at the current code (lines 51-56):
```tsx
<EmptyState>
  <EmptyStateHeader
    headingLevel="h4"
    icon={<EmptyStateIcon icon={AddCircleOIcon} />}
    titleText={t('No {{kind}} found', { kind })}
  />
```

In v6, this should become:
```tsx
<EmptyState
  headingLevel="h4"
  icon={AddCircleOIcon}
  titleText={t('No {{kind}} found', { kind })}
>
```

The `EmptyStateHeader` component is removed and its props move to `EmptyState`. The `EmptyStateIcon` wrapper is removed — `icon` takes the icon component directly.

After changes, `EmptyStateHeader` and `EmptyStateIcon` are no longer used, so their imports should be removed.

arguments.before:
<EmptyState>
          <EmptyStateHeader
            headingLevel="h4"
            icon={<EmptyStateIcon icon={AddCircleOIcon} />}
            titleText={t('No {{kind}} found', { kind })}
          />

### Fix 2
Line: 64
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: EmptyStateActions

This prop may be intended to receive content that was previously passed as children. Review the JSX children of <EmptyState> and determine if any should be moved to the `titleText` prop.

  After:  <EmptyState titleText=>other children</EmptyState>
